no_changes_rationale:
status: needs_investigation
reason: The requested server-spawn migration depends on the unified ExecuteLoopSpec refactor tracked by open bead ddx-89a9c305 ("server: replace ExecuteLoopWorkerSpec with unified spec in workers"), but this worktree still uses the server-local ExecuteLoopWorkerSpec and in-process WorkerManager.runWorker path in cli/internal/server/workers.go:27-50, 347-447, 710-910. Until that prerequisite lands, I cannot safely wire handleStartExecuteLoopWorker to spawn `ddx work` while proving that MaxCostUSD, RequestTimeout, MinPower, MaxPower, OpaquePassthrough, and FromRev survive the path.
